Index

All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

A

addToBack(E) - Method in class Node
Appends a new node holding value to the tail of the linked list.
addToFront(E) - Method in class Node
Prepends value to the front of the linked list.

N

next - Variable in class Node
 
Node<E> - Class in Unnamed Package
A generic singly-linked list Node.
Node(E) - Constructor for class Node
Constructs a single-element Node with no successor.
Node(ArrayList<E>) - Constructor for class Node
Constructs a linked list from an ArrayList, making this Node the head.
NodeTest - Class in Unnamed Package
JUnit 4 unit tests for Node and SortableNode.
NodeTest() - Constructor for class NodeTest
 

R

rotate(int) - Method in class Node
Rotates the linked list to the right by k positions in place.

S

sort() - Method in class SortableNode
Sorts the linked list in place in ascending natural order.
SortableNode<E> - Class in Unnamed Package
A generic linked list Node that extends Node with sorting capability.
SortableNode(E) - Constructor for class SortableNode
Constructs a single-element SortableNode with no successor.
SortableNode(ArrayList<E>) - Constructor for class SortableNode
Constructs a SortableNode linked list from an ArrayList, making this node the head.

T

testAddToBackInteger() - Method in class NodeTest
addToBack appends an Integer to the tail of a multi-node list.
testAddToBackIntegerSingleNode() - Method in class NodeTest
addToBack on a single-Integer node creates a two-node list.
testAddToBackString() - Method in class NodeTest
addToBack appends a String to the tail of a multi-node list.
testAddToBackStringSingleNode() - Method in class NodeTest
addToBack on a single-String node creates a two-node list.
testAddToFrontInteger() - Method in class NodeTest
addToFront prepends an Integer; the head reference remains the same object.
testAddToFrontIntegerMultipleTimes() - Method in class NodeTest
Successive Integer addToFront calls produce the correct final order.
testAddToFrontString() - Method in class NodeTest
addToFront prepends a String; the head reference remains the same object.
testAddToFrontStringMultipleTimes() - Method in class NodeTest
Successive String addToFront calls produce the correct final order.
testRotateIntegerByOne() - Method in class NodeTest
rotate(1) moves only the last Integer element to the front.
testRotateIntegerFullCycle() - Method in class NodeTest
rotate(length) is a full cycle and leaves an Integer list unchanged.
testRotateIntegerLabExample() - Method in class NodeTest
Integer rotate(2) matches the lab example: [1,2,3,4,5] -> [4,5,1,2,3].
testRotateIntegerNegativeThrows() - Method in class NodeTest
Negative k throws IllegalArgumentException for Integer list.
testRotateIntegerZero() - Method in class NodeTest
rotate(0) leaves an Integer list unchanged.
testRotateNegativeMessage() - Method in class NodeTest
The IllegalArgumentException carries the required message.
testRotateString() - Method in class NodeTest
String rotate(1) moves the last String element to the front.
testRotateStringZero() - Method in class NodeTest
rotate(0) leaves a String list unchanged.
testSortInteger() - Method in class NodeTest
sort() arranges Integers in ascending order, keeping duplicates.
testSortIntegerAlreadySorted() - Method in class NodeTest
sort() on an already-sorted Integer list leaves it unchanged.
testSortIntegerSingleElement() - Method in class NodeTest
sort() on a single Integer node produces no change.
testSortString() - Method in class NodeTest
sort() arranges Strings in lexicographic ascending order.
testSortStringSingleElement() - Method in class NodeTest
sort() on a single String node produces no change.
testToStringInteger() - Method in class NodeTest
Integer list of multiple elements is comma-and-space separated.
testToStringSingleInteger() - Method in class NodeTest
Single-element Integer list produces no comma.
testToStringSingleString() - Method in class NodeTest
Single-element String list produces no comma.
testToStringString() - Method in class NodeTest
String list of multiple elements is comma-and-space separated.
testUniqueSortInteger() - Method in class NodeTest
uniqueSort() sorts Integers and removes all duplicate values.
testUniqueSortIntegerAllSame() - Method in class NodeTest
uniqueSort() when all Integer values are equal leaves exactly one node.
testUniqueSortIntegerNoDuplicates() - Method in class NodeTest
uniqueSort() on an Integer list with no duplicates just sorts it.
testUniqueSortString() - Method in class NodeTest
uniqueSort() sorts Strings and removes all duplicate values.
testUniqueSortStringNoDuplicates() - Method in class NodeTest
uniqueSort() on a String list with no duplicates just sorts it.
toString() - Method in class Node
Returns a comma-and-space-separated String of every value in the list, starting from this head node and traversing to the tail.

U

uniqueSort() - Method in class SortableNode
Sorts the list and removes all duplicate values so that each distinct value appears exactly once.

V

val - Variable in class Node
